title: • I have balanced paragraphs (each subject is addressed fairly).
content:
• I have balanced paragraphs (each subject is addressed fairly).
• I used transitions to connect my ideas.
• Each paragraph supports the thesis with specific examples or reasoning.
• My paper is free of major grammar or formatting issues.
• I used the APA template as a guide.

⸻

⚠️ Peer Review Participation Reminder:

You must submit your draft on time to receive full credit and participate in peer review. Late drafts may receive reduced or zero peer feedback.

⸻

✅ Rubric (Total: 100 pts)

Criteria Points
Clear Thesis Statement 20 pts
Logical Essay Organization 20 pts
Balanced Compare/Contrast 20 pts
Topic Sentences & Transitions 20 pts
Grammar, APA Style, Formatting 20 pts



⸻

📂 Submission:

Upload your essay to this assignment page by the listed due date. Use the following naming convention:
context: From document: ✅ Assignment 3A: Peer Review Letter – Compare & Contrast Essay — chunk 8 (chunk 8/11)
